games.name: Dead Man's Tide
games.visual_world: Pirate world — stormy open seas, weathered galleons cutting through crashing waves, salt-crusted docks wrapped in sea fog, barnacle-covered hulls, flickering lanterns on creaking ships, treasure maps, rope ladders, dramatic ocean horizons under dark rolling clouds. Gritty, dangerous, and alive.

games.name: Ashen Kingdom
games.visual_world: Dark fantasy realm — crumbling stone kingdoms buried under ash, smoldering ruins glowing with dying embers, skeletal forests, armored figures silhouetted against a blood-red sky, cursed landscapes, ancient battlefields, ember-lit darkness. Grim, atmospheric, and foreboding.

art_rotation.style: Cosmic lo-fi, not space opera — avoid photorealistic space photography, starfield/nebula/ringed-planet stock imagery, spaceships, space stations, or any busy sci-fi scene. No readable text, no faces. Meditative and ancient — the feeling of held breath, not spectacle.

registers.name: Monolith
registers.prompt: A single ancient stone structure etched with faint glowing glyphs, standing alone in an empty dark void, lit by one distant point of light. Heavy negative space, restrained and quiet, with restrained carved detail rather than an overly intricate surface — wide shot or extreme close-up on the etched texture. Soft matte painterly digital illustration with fine film grain.

registers.name: Energy
registers.prompt: Fully abstract cosmic force — threads of light slowly converging toward, or radiating from, a single point of stillness. Topographic and painterly rather than illustrative, heavy negative space in the outer frame. Soft matte painterly digital illustration with fine film grain.

registers.name: Sigil
registers.prompt: The entity's own established sigil mark: {motif}.

entities.name: Order
entities.motif: a radial compass of concentric rings around a glowing hexagram core, with a vertical star-tipped axis through the center — precise and symmetric

entities.name: Chaos
entities.color: vivid red with brighter ember-orange at its hottest points
entities.motif: a fractal burst of jagged, cracked lightning-like branches radiating from a dark circular void at the center — chaotic, spiky, and organic

entities.name: Void
entities.color: white and silver, near-monochrome, with a center of pure unlit black
entities.motif: a glowing ring encircling total blackness like the rim of a black hole, with two small satellite circles above and below on a vertical axis

entities.name: Existence
entities.motif: a vertical star-cross through overlapping concentric rings, with two small orbiting points along the horizontal axis

entities.name: Time
entities.motif: a spiral galaxy vortex with a vertical star-tipped axis through its center, fine star-dust trailing along the spiral arms

entities.name: Space
entities.motif: layered orbital rings with tiny glowing planets caught mid-orbit, a bright four-point star at the core

entities.name: Energy
entities.motif: a swirling vortex of cracked lightning-like tendrils spiraling around a bright ringed core, with a cross-hair axis through the center

games.name: High Noon Saloon
games.visual_world: Wild West frontier — sun-scorched desert under a blazing noon sun, dusty saloon interiors with whiskey glasses and wanted posters, a lone gunslinger standing in cracked earth, tumbleweeds drifting past weathered wooden storefronts, long shadows at high noon. Tense and cinematic.
